items.title_en: Trump rips Canada as wildfire smoke spreads, says U.S. will add pollution cost to tariffs
items.title_zh: 野火烟雾蔓延，特朗普撕裂加拿大，称美国将在关税中增加污染成本
items.desc_en: The smoke coming from active wildfires in Canada has led to unhealthy air quality in swaths of the U.S., which could affect the upcoming World Cup final.
items.desc_zh: 加拿大活跃的野火产生的烟雾导致美国大片地区的空气质量不健康，这可能会影响即将举行的世界杯决赛。

items.title_en: Wall St slides as chip selloff broadens - Reuters
items.title_zh: 芯片抛售扩大，华尔街股市下滑 - 路透中文网

items.desc_zh: 芯片抛售扩大，华尔街股市下滑 路透 半导体股因投资者逢低买入而收窄跌幅 雅虎财经 在中国最新的人工智能突破震撼科技股后，纳斯达克指数下跌 1% CNNChi

items.title_en: Iraq and Syria sign agreement to restore oil pipeline that would provide alternative to Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 伊拉克和叙利亚签署协议恢复石油管道，这将成为霍尔木兹海峡的替代方案
items.desc_en: Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi is visiting the U.S. this week. He met with President Donald Trump at the White House on Tuesday.
items.desc_zh: 伊拉克总理阿里·扎伊迪本周将访问美国。他周二在白宫会见了唐纳德·特朗普总统。

items.title_en: SpaceX's sagging stock 'dampens the mood' for blockbuster IPOs
items.title_zh: SpaceX 股价下跌“打击了重磅 IPO 的情绪”
items.desc_en: The stock on Friday traded near $126 — about 7% below its IPO price of $135.
items.desc_zh: 该股周五交易价格接近 126 美元，比 135 美元的 IPO 价格低约 7%。

items.title_en: EU proposes slowing down cuts to carbon emissions for businesses
items.title_zh: 欧盟提议放慢企业碳排放削减速度
items.desc_en: Under the proposals, the EU plans to relax its emissions trading system to give companies more time to reduce their carbon output.
items.desc_zh: 根据这些提案，欧盟计划放宽其排放交易体系，让企业有更多时间减少碳排放。

items.title_en: Oil tankers face 'worst case scenario' in Hormuz as Iran steps up attacks on ships, maritime risk CEO says
items.title_zh: 海事风险首席执行官表示，随着伊朗加大对船只的攻击力度，油轮在霍尔木兹面临“最糟糕的情况”
items.desc_en: One seafarer was killed and three were injured in attack on the crude oil tanker Al Bahyah off Oman's coast on Tuesday.
items.desc_zh: 周二，阿曼海岸附近的 Al Bahyah 号原油油轮遭到袭击，造成一名海员死亡、三人受伤。

items.title_en: Magnitude 7.3 earthquake quake strikes off Mexico coast
items.title_zh: 墨西哥海岸发生里氏7.3级地震
items.desc_en: The US Tsunami Warning Center issued a warning and has recorded waves 0.3m (1.1 feet) high in Puerto Madero and Chiapas in Mexico.
items.desc_zh: 美国海啸预警中心发出警告，并记录到墨西哥马德罗港和恰帕斯州海浪高达 0.3m（1.1 英尺）。

items.title_en: FAA lets Boeing sign off on 737 Max, 787 airworthiness certificates again
items.title_zh: 美国联邦航空局允许波音再次签署 737 Max 和 787 适航证书
items.desc_en: The move is a vote of confidence in Boeing from the U.S. government.
items.desc_zh: 此举是美国政府对波音公司投的信任票。

items.title_en: Retail and Wall Street are underwater on SpaceX — but not going down without a fight
items.title_zh: 零售业和华尔街在 SpaceX 的影响下陷入困境，但不会不战而屈人之兵
items.desc_en: Good times for SpaceX are proving short-lived as Elon Musk’s intergalactic IPO is now giving fodder to bears.
items.desc_zh: 事实证明，SpaceX 的好时光是短暂的，因为埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的星际首次公开募股 (IPO) 现在给空头提供了素材。

items.title_en: Epstein victims blast Trump attorney general nominee Todd Blanche after meeting
items.title_zh: 爱泼斯坦受害者在会见特朗普总检察长候选人托德·布兰奇后抨击
items.desc_en: "Todd Blanche treated the meeting as a mere 'check-the-box' exercise intended to secure votes for his confirmation," said Epstein survivor Dani Bensky.
items.desc_zh: 爱泼斯坦幸存者丹尼·本斯基 (Dani Bensky) 表示：“托德·布兰奇将这次会议视为一次‘勾选’活动，旨在确保投票支持他的任命。”

items.title_zh: 加州的亿万富翁税：美国最大州经济面临的风险

items.title_en: Democratic socialists top MAGA candidates among voters in CNBC's All-America poll
items.title_zh: 在 CNBC 的全美民意调查中，民主社会主义者在选民中名列前茅
items.desc_en: The survey's findings come as democratic socialist candidates win Democratic primaries following the 2025 election of New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani.
items.desc_zh: 该调查结果发布之际，民主社会主义候选人在 2025 年纽约市市长佐兰·马姆达尼 (Zohran Mamdani) 当选后赢得了民主党初选。

items.title_en: Amazon's Zoox issues software recall after robotaxi drove into heavy smoke
items.title_zh: 机器人出租车驶入浓烟后，亚马逊 Zoox 召回软件
items.desc_en: Last month, an unoccupied Zoox robotaxi drove into an active emergency fire scene that was clouded with smoke, the company said.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，上个月，一辆无人驾驶的 Zoox 机器人出租车驶入了一片浓烟滚滚的紧急火灾现场。

items.title_en: Inside the Chinese fraud rings stealing billions from banks and retailers
items.title_zh: 中国诈骗团伙从银行和零售商那里窃取了数十亿美元
items.desc_en: Chinese organized crime groups are making as much as $1 billion annually in tap-to-pay fraud schemes targeting retailers and banks.
items.desc_zh: 中国的有组织犯罪集团每年通过针对零售商和银行的点击支付欺诈计划赚取高达 10 亿美元的收入。

items.title_en: Economic outlook is worsening and Trump is getting blamed, CNBC survey finds
items.title_zh: CNBC 调查发现，经济前景正在恶化，特朗普受到指责
items.desc_en: The public is as depressed about the economy as it has been since the years just after the pandemic, according to the All-America Economic Survey.
items.desc_zh: 根据全美经济调查，公众对经济的沮丧程度与大流行后几年一样。

items.title_en: School bus crash kills at least 20 pupils in Uganda
items.title_zh: 乌干达校车相撞事故造成至少20名学生死亡
items.desc_en: Dozens others, including school staff, were injured in the crash, suspected to have been caused by a mechanical fault.
items.desc_zh: 包括学校工作人员在内的数十人在事故中受伤，怀疑是由机械故障造成的。

items.title_en: China hits out at British Steel nationalisation
items.title_zh: 中国猛烈抨击英国钢铁公司国有化
items.desc_en: The UK government said taking the firm into public hands would safeguard "a vital national capability".
items.desc_zh: 英国政府表示，将该公司纳入公众手中将维护“重要的国家能力”。

items.title_en: Japan relaxes royal succession rules - but ban on female emperors remains
items.title_zh: 日本放宽皇室继承规则 - 但对女天皇的禁令仍然存在
items.desc_en: The law now allows the adoption of male distant relatives aged over 15 back into the imperial family.
items.desc_zh: 现在法律允许皇室收养15岁以上的男性远亲。

items.title_en: Olympic cyclist admits to driving despite ban after crash that killed wife
items.title_zh: 奥运自行车手承认在撞车事故导致妻子死亡后不顾禁令开车
items.desc_en: Rohan Dennis pleaded guilty to driving while disqualified after police pulled him over last month.
items.desc_zh: 罗汉·丹尼斯(Rohan Dennis)上个月被警方拦下后，承认了在被取消驾驶资格的情况下开车的罪名。

items.title_en: Stock futures slip as major averages head for losing week; Netflix tumbles after earnings: Live updates
items.title_zh: 随着主要股指本周将下跌，股指期货下跌； Netflix 财报公布后股价暴跌：实时更新
items.desc_en: The moves come after a decline in chipmakers dragged the broader market lower.
items.desc_zh: 这些举措是在芯片制造商股价下跌拖累大盘走低之后发生的。

items.title_en: Trump alleges 'shocking vulnerabilities' in US election security ahead of midterms
items.title_zh: 特朗普称中期选举前美国选举安全存在“令人震惊的漏洞”
items.desc_en: The president accuses China of meddling in the 2020 election, directly contradicting past findings from US intelligence.
items.desc_zh: 总统指责中国干预 2020 年大选，这与美国情报部门过去的调查结果直接矛盾。

items.title_en: More than 500 Rohingya vanished at sea - what happened?
items.title_zh: 超过 500 名罗兴亚人在海上失踪——到底发生了什么？
items.desc_en: Two boats carrying an estimated 530 Rohingyas have disappeared since leaving Myanmar on 29 June.
items.desc_zh: 自 6 月 29 日离开缅甸以来，两艘载有约 530 名罗辛亚人的船只失踪。

items.title_en: Australia 'deeply frustrated' over Laos methanol poisoning charges
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚对老挝甲醇中毒指控“深感沮丧”
items.desc_en: Media reports say Laos will press charges of up to one year in jail  against those allegedly responsible.
items.desc_zh: 媒体报道称，老挝将对涉嫌肇事者提出最高一年监禁的指控。

items.title_en: Philippines condemns monkey video on Chinese media as racist
items.title_zh: 菲律宾谴责中国媒体上的猴子视频为种族主义
items.desc_en: The AI video on China Daily showed a monkey in Philippine garments singing its claims to the South China Sea.

items.desc_en: The US says its attacks aim to "further degrade Iranian military capabilities", as fighting continued for the sixth day in a row.
items.desc_zh: 美国表示，其袭击旨在“进一步削弱伊朗的军事能力”，战斗已连续第六天持续。

items.title_zh: 空气质量警报延伸至美国 加拿大800多处山火在燃烧

items.title_en: Teen hackers who live streamed cyber-attack on TfL jailed
items.title_zh: 直播伦敦交通局网络攻击的青少年黑客被判入狱
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_zh: TikTok 因儿童年龄检查面临 Ofcom 调查
items.desc_en: It follows a review by the regulator in May that criticised the platform for not being "safe enough" for children.
items.desc_zh: 此前，监管机构在五月份进行了一项审查，批评该平台对儿童来说“不够安全”。

items.title_en: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.title_en: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait?
items.title_zh: 《刺客信条：黑旗》重制版值得 13 年的等待吗？
items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。

items.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.title_zh: 苹果起诉 OpenAI，其员工声称窃取商业机密
items.desc_en: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.desc_zh: 苹果在周五的诉讼中表示，OpenAI 新兴的硬件业务“已经烂到了核心”。

items.title_en: EU threatens Meta with fines over 'addictive' Facebook and Instagram
items.title_zh: 欧盟因 Facebook 和 Instagram 上瘾而对 Meta 进行罚款威胁
items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。

items.title_en: Big tech must deal with scam ads under Ofcom proposals
items.title_zh: 根据 Ofcom 的提议，大型科技公司必须处理诈骗广告
items.desc_en: Ofcom says more than half of UK adults have encountered potentially fraudulent ads online.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，超过一半的英国成年人在网上遇到过潜在的欺诈性广告。

items.title_en: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
items.title_zh: “90秒制冷”——假冒移动空调席卷网络
items.desc_en: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.
items.desc_zh: ASA 表示，声称小型设备可以快速冷却房间的广告好得令人难以置信。
